barbarian_helmet.name: Barbarian Helmet
barbarian_helmet.description: A rugged iron helmet, scarred from countless battles. It offers solid protection while marking its wearer as a fearless warrior of the wild lands.

barbarian_chestplate.name: Barbarian Chestplate
barbarian_chestplate.description: A heavy chestplate forged from crude iron and reinforced with thick leather straps. Built to absorb brutal blows, it favors raw durability over refined craftsmanship.

barbarian_pants.name: Barbarian Pants
barbarian_pants.description: Rough, battle-worn trousers made from thick leather and fur. They provide solid protection while allowing the freedom needed for relentless combat.

barbarian_boots.name: Barbarian Boots
barbarian_boots.description: Heavy boots reinforced with iron and stitched hide. Designed to endure harsh terrain, they grant stability and resilience in the heat of battle.

barbarian_sword.name: Barbarian Sword
barbarian_sword.description: A massive, brutally forged blade that favors strength over finesse. Each swing delivers devastating force, capable of cleaving through armor and bone alike.

barbarian_amulet.name: Barbarian Amulet
barbarian_amulet.description: A primitive talisman imbued with the spirit of ancient warriors. It bolsters vitality and awakens a savage battle instinct within its wearer.
